title: DonatJS LMS: Minimalist Client-Side Router & UI Engine for Web Programming Courses
description:
A zero-dependency, no-build-step, JSON-driven micro-framework deployed as open courseware for the Web Programming (Pemrograman Web) course at Universitas IPWIJA, Jakarta. The platform transforms declarative JavaScript objects into rendered components — hero sections, feature cards, quiz engines, certificate verifiers, and 16-module structured learning content — without any external libraries or build toolchains.

The course covers the full web development stack in a client-side-first approach: HTML5 semantics, CSS3 layout & variables, JavaScript ES6+ (DOM, events, closures), LocalStorage CRUD, Fetch API with JSON hydration, and Single Page Application architecture. The final project challenges students to build a functional CMS from scratch.

The framework lineage traces from Ktupad (2019, PHP/MVC) → BayamJS (2023, JS/MVC) → DonatJS (2024–2026, JSON-driven CSR). Lighthouse audit metrics: Performance 98, Accessibility 92, Best Practices 100, SEO 90.

HKI Copyright registration: EC00202414144. Patent application: S00202503129 (DJKI Indonesia).

creators.name: Sismadi, Wawan
creators.institution: Universitas IPWIJA / PT Sismadi Langit Solusi
